summary.key_theme: 市場高度關注 Tesla 即將公布的財報，多空觀點分歧，同時面臨地緣政治風險與競爭對手產品的挑戰。

bullish.title: TSLA Stock Rises Overnight On Germany Ramp Ahead Of Q2: Analyst Sees 10% Delivery Jump This Year, Improving Margins
bullish.reason: 分析師預期交付量將成長 10 % 且利潤率改善，投資人聚焦於 Cybertruck 與 FSD 15 等關鍵產品進展。

bullish.title: Tesla stock: How much does an improved auto business matter?
bullish.reason: 汽車業務表現改善有助於提升短期獲利，並為其人工智慧領域的投資提供資金支持。

bullish.title: Elon Musk's Tesla Remains One of the Last Great Founder-Led Tech Giants. Is the Stock a Buy Before July 22?
bullish.reason: 強調創辦人領導風格的長期價值，探討財報公布前的買入機會。

bearish.title: Tesla Heads Into Its July 22 Earnings Down 22%, and One Firm Sees a 67% Plunge From Here. Who's Right?
bearish.reason: 股價已下跌 22 %，且有機構預測未來仍有 67 % 的下跌空間，市場對財報預期極度分歧。

bearish.title: Mercedes Benz (XTRA:MBG) Unveils CLA 250 Plus To Take On Tesla Model 3
bearish.reason: Mercedes-Benz 推出 CLA 250 + 直接挑戰 Model 3 市場份額，對 Tesla 的產品競爭力構成威脅。

bearish.title: Elon Musk’s Net Worth Slumps Amid Tesla, SpaceX Crash
bearish.reason: 反映公司股價近期疲軟，導致創辦人身價縮水，可能影響市場信心。

neutral.title: What to Expect in Markets This Week: Alphabet, Tesla and Intel Headline Big Tech Earnings Reports
neutral.reason: 作為本週科技股財報的重頭戲，市場正處於觀望狀態，等待 7 月 22 日的財報結果。

neutral.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Jump As U.S.-Iran Attacks Escalate; Google, Tesla Ahead
neutral.reason: 地緣政治風險（伊朗衝突）導致大盤期貨下跌，Tesla 作為大型科技股受到整體市場情緒波動影響。

neutral.title: Options Actions: Tesla options traders are split ahead of earnings
neutral.reason: 選擇權交易員在財報公布前意見分歧，顯示市場對短期波動的預期不確定。
